title: Luffy Breaks Into Mr. 3’s Trap
main_description: Luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants. The chapter is divided into display-ready story parts with cleaned dialogue and context-based speaker names.
key_events: Luffy Charges Into the Wax Trap
Mr. 5 and Miss Valentine Press In
